originalTitle: Higher gas prices aren’t the only way rising tensions with Iran will hit home
summary: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.
content: Wall Street expects President Donald Trump’s call that the Iran cease-fire is over will hurt airlines and home builders more than it will help oil companies.
chineseTitle: 天然气价格上涨并不是与伊朗紧张局势加剧的唯一原因
chineseSummary: 华尔街预计，唐纳德·特朗普总统关于伊朗停火结束的呼吁对航空公司和房屋建筑商的伤害将大于对石油公司的帮助。
chineseContent: 华尔街预计，唐纳德·特朗普总统关于伊朗停火结束的呼吁对航空公司和房屋建筑商的伤害将大于对石油公司的帮助。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
